text:
EXPLANATION: This reference refers to a publicly available dataset titled "Chemical reactions from US patents (1976-Sep2016)" published by Daniel Lowe on Figshare in 2017. While it is a dataset rather than an academic paper, it is a widely cited and well-documented research resource in cheminformatics, making the citation valid.

LINK: https://figshare.com/articles/dataset/Chemical_reactions_from_US_patents_1976-Sep2016_/5104873
FOUND_TITLE: Chemical reactions from US patents (1976-Sep2016)
FOUND_AUTHORS: Daniel Lowe
FOUND_YEAR: 2017
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
